source_rationale: PRG4 (lubricin/proteoglycan 4) is a marker of synovial fibroblasts lining the joint cavity
FBN1 (fibrillin-1) is an extracellular matrix gene characteristic of mesenchymal/fibroblast lineage cells
PI16 is a marker of universal/adventitial fibroblasts in multiple tissues
MFAP5 (microfibril-associated protein 5) is expressed by fibroblasts producing extracellular matrix
CD248 (endosialin) is a surface marker of mesenchymal stromal/fibroblast cells
COL1A1 is a major collagen gene defining fibroblast identity and ECM production
Decorin is a proteoglycan highly expressed by fibroblasts involved in collagen fibril assembly
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator enriched in synovial lining fibroblasts
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase characteristic of fibroblasts remodeling extracellular matrix
IL1RL1 (ST2) is a receptor for IL-33 and a hallmark of Th2 and tissue-resident T helper cells
GATA3 is the master transcription factor for Th2 CD4+ T cell differentiation
KLRB1 (CD161) marks Th2/Th17-related T cell subsets
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on memory/effector CD4+ T cells
HPGD (prostaglandin dehydrogenase) is enriched in regulatory/Th2 T cell subsets
CCR4 is a chemokine receptor characteristic of Th2 and regulatory T cells
IL2RA (CD25) marks activated T cells and is enriched on Th2/Treg subsets
RORA is a transcription factor associated with Th2 and ILC2 cell identity
KIT (CD117) marks innate lymphoid cell progenitors and immature T cell subsets
DLL1 is a Notch ligand associated with early T cell development and ILC precursors
CCR6 marks Th17-like and tissue-homing innate lymphoid/T cell subsets
IL7R is a key survival receptor on ILC progenitors and naive/memory T cells

TNFSF11 (RANKL) is expressed by activated T cells and ILC3-like cells

KIT expression suggests an immature/progenitor T cell or ILC identity
TCF7 is a transcription factor marking naive and stem-like memory T cells

SLC4A10 is a known marker of MAIT cells among T cell populations
CD8A expression combined with gamma-delta TCR genes suggests CD8+ gamma-delta T cells
IL1B is a pro-inflammatory cytokine highly expressed by activated monocytes/macrophages
S100A9 is a damage-associated molecular pattern protein marking inflammatory monocytes

FCN1 is a classical monocyte marker involved in innate immunity
